zh.lifeSummary: Alice Godbold是Thomas Godbold的女兒，於1502年出生在英國素福爾可巴迪加姆。她於1529年與Thomas Derehaugh在英國素福爾可巴迪加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1593年在她的家鄉享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴迪加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Godbold是Thomas Godbold的女儿，于1502年出生在英国素福爾可巴迪加姆。她于1529年与Thomas Derehaugh在英国素福爾可巴迪加姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1593年在她的家乡享年91岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可巴迪加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Godbold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): from the Middle English and Old French personal name Godebald, Godbaud, a medieval French form of the ancient Germanic name Godebald, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ or god ‘god’ + bald ‘bold, brave’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Alice Godbold was born in 1502, in Badingham, Suffolk, England as the daughter of Thomas Godbold. She married Thomas Derehaugh in 1529, in Badingham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1593, in her hometown, at the age of 91, and was buried in Badingham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Godbold est née en 1502, à Badingham, Suffolk, Angleterre, fille de Thomas Godbold. Elle a épousé Thomas Derehaugh en 1529, à Badingham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1593, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Badingham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Godbold wurde 1502 in Badingham, Suffolk, England, als Tochter von Thomas Godbold geboren. Sie hat 1529 in Badingham, Suffolk, England Thomas Derehaugh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1593 im Alter von 91 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Badingham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Godbold è nata il nel 1502 nel Badingham, Suffolk, England come figlia di Thomas Godbold. Lei sposato Thomas Derehaugh nel 1529, nel Badingham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1593, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolta a Badingham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Godboldは1502年にイギリススフォルクバディンガムでThomas Godboldの娘として生まれた。1529年にイギリススフォルクバディンガムでThomas Derehaughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1593年に故郷で91歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクバディンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Godbold(은)는 1502년 영국 수폴크 바딩함에서 Thomas Godbold의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1529년 영국 수폴크 바딩함에서 Thomas Derehaugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1593년 그녀의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바딩함에 묻혔다.

mn.St John the Baptist Churchyard, Badingha: Badingham, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Alice Godbold nasceu em 1502, em Badingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra filha de Thomas Godbold. Ela casou-se com Thomas Derehaugh em 1529, em Badingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1593, em sua cidade natal, com 91 anos, e foi sepultada em Badingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Godbold родилась в 1502 г. в местности бадингхам, суффолк, Англия. Её отца звали Thomas Godbold. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Derehaugh в 1529 г. в местности бадингхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1593 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности бадингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Alice Godbold nació en 1502, en Badingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra como hija de Thomas Godbold. Se casó con Thomas Derehaugh en 1529, en Badingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1593, en su pueblo, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultada en Badingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
